# Dia Browser Release Notes - Feature Announcements

**Release Date: March 19, 2026 (v1.23.0)**

## New Features & Capabilities

1. **GitHub Live Tab Groups Improvements** - Enhanced PR workflow with visual feedback animations when completing reviews or merging pull requests

2. **Celebration Animations** - "Subtle animations that signal the transition from in-progress to done" for completed PR work

3. **Automatic Cleanup Notifications** - Visual confirmation when merged PRs are automatically cleaned up from tab groups

4. **Recently Completed PR Preview** - Ability to hover and preview finished pull requests and restore them to active view

5. **Expressive Navigation Controls** - Enhanced animations for back, forward, and reload browser controls with "more expressive animations into everyday interactions"

6. **Skill Updates** - Easier creation of Skills with expanded feature usage capabilities (referenced in update instructions)

## Past Releases Referenced

- **v1.22.0** (March 11, 2026) - "Don't think about the next step. Take it."
- **v1.21.0** (March 5, 2026) - "Before you reach for it..."
- **v1.20.0** (February 26, 2026) - "Little moments. Big feeling."
